features.name: Session Persistence
features.description: Atomic JSON writes to .harness/sessions.json on every state change; restored on server startup

features.name: Workspace Garbage Collection
features.description: Background asyncio GC loop runs every 30 min; removes workspaces for terminal sessions older than GC_MAX_AGE (default 4h)

features.name: Rate-Limit Memory GC
features.description: Inline GC in check_rate_limit() evicts stale IP keys older than 120s every 5 minutes

features.name: Agent-Expert Lessons Store
features.description: lessons.jsonl seeded with 12 entries; GET/POST /api/lessons endpoints; categories: persistence/security/rate-limit/gc/windows/deployment/claude/architecture

features.name: Evaluator Tier (Quality Gate)
features.description: Second claude -p pass grades output on correctness/completeness/style/security; BLOCKING gate with max 2 retries; scores streamed to WebSocket

features.name: Webhook Trigger Support
features.description: POST /api/webhook accepts signed GitHub/Linear webhooks; parses event type → selects ADW → creates build session automatically

features.name: PITER Intent Classifier
features.description: Classifies briefs as feature/bug/chore/spike/hotfix; routes to corresponding ADW template; enforced at brief entry in UI

features.name: ADW Template Engine
features.description: 5 Agent Defined Workflow templates (feature/bugfix/chore/review/spike) in .harness/templates/; auto-selected by PITER classifier

features.name: Skills Loader / Registry
features.description: src/tao/skills.py parses all skills/*/SKILL.md frontmatter; intent-to-skill mapping; injects relevant skills into brief context

features.name: CLAUDE.md Documentation
features.description: Full project context: architecture, file map, dev setup, code conventions, smoke test checklist — replaces stub template

features.name: Security: settings.local.json untracked
features.description: .claude/settings.local.json added to .gitignore and git rm --cached; local permissions preserved

features.name: Auto-Brief from Linear Issues
features.description: Webhook handler auto-generates Claude briefs when Linear issue moves to In Progress; no human prompt required

features.name: Leverage Audit Baseline
features.description: .harness/leverage-audit.md tracks 12-point ZTE score over time; updated each sprint cycle

features.name: ZTE Sprint Score Tracking
features.description: Changelog in leverage-audit.md records before/after per sprint; current 60/60 Zero Touch band

features.name: Harness Directories Populated
features.description: .harness/agents/, contracts/, qa/, templates/ all populated with tier specs, build/eval contracts, regression checklist, ADW templates

features.name: Fan-Out Parallelism
features.description: app/server/orchestrator.py: fan_out() decomposes brief via Claude, launches N parallel workers; POST /api/build/parallel endpoint

features.name: TAO Engine Wire-Up
features.description: BudgetTracker initialised per session; TierConfig loaded from .harness/config.yaml; _select_model() reads agents block for auto model selection

features.name: Daily Anthropic Docs Pull
features.description: scripts/fetch_anthropic_docs.py fetches 6 key doc pages daily; scheduled task at 5:50am AEST; saved to .harness/anthropic-docs/

features.name: Autonomous Board Meetings
features.description: Scheduled task at 0/6/12/18 AEST; 6-phase flow: Status → Linear Review → SWOT → Sprint Recs → Save Minutes → Update issues; no human gates

features.name: Sandbox Auto-Generate
features.description: Phase 3.5 in run_build(): validates workspace exists, auto-re-clones if GC'd mid-session; hard gate if re-clone fails

features.name: Lesson Context Injection
features.description: _get_lesson_context() injects relevant lessons.jsonl entries per intent into every brief before Claude sees it

features.name: Closed-Loop Evaluator Retry
features.description: Evaluator critique injected into retry prompt; re-generates then re-evaluates; max 2 retries before blocking push

features.name: Phase Checkpoints + Session Resume
features.description: _should_skip() per phase; POST /api/sessions/{sid}/resume skips already-completed phases; persisted to .harness/sessions.json

features.name: Clone + Generator Retry with Backoff
features.description: git clone: 3 attempts with 2s/4s backoff; generator: 2-attempt retry; phase-level failure checkpoints persisted

features.name: Auto-Learn from Evaluator
features.description: _parse_evaluator_dimensions() extracts 4 scores; dimensions below threshold auto-appended to lessons.jsonl for future brief injection

features.name: Cron Triggers API
features.description: app/server/cron.py + .harness/cron-triggers.json; GET/POST/DELETE /api/triggers; cron_loop() background task; complements webhook triggers

features.name: E2E Integration Smoke Test
features.description: scripts/smoke_test.py — 28-check E2E regression suite validating full pipeline: Brief → PITER → ADW → Claude → Evaluator → GitHub push

features.name: Error Recovery — Transient Failure Retry
features.description: 3-attempt exponential backoff on git push (2s/4s/8s); structured error reporting on final failure

features.name: Webhook Secrets Mandatory
features.description: Webhook handler hard-fails on missing GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET/LINEAR_WEBHOOK_SECRET; removes silent pass-through.

features.name: Telegram Webhook Token in Header
features.description: Bot token moved from URL query string to X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token header; old URL-param route removed.

features.name: Pydantic Request Validation
features.description: All POST endpoints use Pydantic models; invalid payloads return 422 with field-level errors.

features.name: CSP Nonce-Based Policy
features.description: unsafe-inline replaced with per-request nonce injection in SecurityHeaders middleware; wasm-unsafe-eval retained for xterm.js.

features.name: Next.js Auth Middleware
features.description: Edge middleware at dashboard/middleware.ts protects all /(main) routes; unauthenticated requests redirect to /login.

features.name: pytest Unit Test Suite
features.description: tests/test_auth.py, test_webhook.py, test_sessions.py; 34 unit tests covering bcrypt migration, HMAC verification, session lifecycle.

features.name: Graceful Shutdown on SIGTERM
features.description: signal handler in main.py drains active sessions before exit; SIGTERM sets a global shutdown flag checked by run_build().

features.name: Background Task Crash Recovery
features.description: GC loop and cron loop wrapped in try/except with exponential backoff restart (5s/30s/120s); crash logged to structured logger.

features.name: Health Check 503 on Unhealthy Deps
features.description: GET /health returns 503 when Claude CLI unreachable or disk >90%; removes blocking Claude check from startup.

features.name: bcrypt Hash Persistence Fix
features.description: bcrypt-upgraded hash now written back to config on first successful login; SHA-256 migration no longer re-runs each restart.

features.name: Duplicate Build Submission Prevention
features.description: Submit button disabled after first click; re-enabled only on error response; prevents double-session creation.

features.name: Env Var Validation at Startup
features.description: Next.js startup validates all required env vars (PI_CEO_URL, PI_CEO_PASSWORD, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, GITHUB_TOKEN); hard fails with clear message.

features.name: CI Expansion — TypeScript + Lint
features.description: GitHub Actions workflow adds tsc --noEmit, ESLint, and flake8 jobs alongside existing smoke test; all three required for merge.

features.name: .env.example Documentation
features.description: .env.example added to repo root documenting all required and optional vars with descriptions and example values.

features.name: sessions.py Phase Extraction
features.description: run_build() phases refactored into separate functions (_phase_clone, _phase_analyze, etc.); each under 40 lines.

features.name: Structured Logging — Remove print()
features.description: All print() calls in board_meeting.py, cron.py, gc.py, sessions.py replaced with logging.getLogger(); _JsonFormatter used.

features.name: Claude Agent SDK PoC — Board Meeting Agent
features.description: app/server/agents/board_meeting.py implements BoardMeetingAgent using claude-agent-sdk; runs as parallel system alongside existing board_meeting cron.

features.name: Pi-SEO Project Registry
features.description: .harness/projects.json lists all 10 monitored repos with metadata; loaded by scanner at runtime.

features.name: Pi-SEO Autonomous Scanner
features.description: app/server/scanner.py orchestrates multi-project scans; runs each project through 4 scanner skills in parallel; persists results to .harness/scan-results/.

features.name: Pi-SEO Triage Engine
features.description: Auto-creates Linear tickets from scanner findings; deduplicates against open issues; assigns severity (critical/high/medium).

features.name: Pi-SEO Security Scanner Skill
features.description: skills/pi-seo-security/SKILL.md: OWASP Top 10 checks + secret detection via regex patterns across all source files.

features.name: Pi-SEO Deployment Health Scanner
features.description: skills/pi-seo-deployment/SKILL.md: Vercel Sandbox browser audit + Core Web Vitals (LCP, CLS, FID) measurement.

features.name: Pi-SEO Dependency Auditor Skill
features.description: skills/pi-seo-dependencies/SKILL.md: npm/pip outdated package detection + CVE lookup via OSV API.

features.name: Pi-SEO Auto-PR Generation
features.description: scanner.py opens GitHub PRs for auto-fixable findings (outdated deps, missing .env.example, stale README).

features.name: Pi-SEO Health Dashboard
features.description: dashboard/app/(main)/health/page.tsx: all 10 repos health scores, latest findings, trend over last 5 scans.

features.name: Pi-SEO Scan Cron Triggers
features.description: .harness/cron-triggers.json extended with entries for all 10 projects; 6-hour rotation so no two scans overlap.

features.name: Pi-SEO MCP Tools
features.description: pi-ceo-server.js: scan_project and get_project_health tools added; total 13 MCP tools.

features.name: Pi-SEO Vercel Sandbox Snapshot
features.description: Pre-baked Chromium snapshot for sub-second browser audit startup; snapshot refreshed weekly.

features.name: Pi-SEO Intelligence Layer
features.description: 3 specialist skills (code-quality, performance, accessibility) + intelligence orchestrator that synthesises findings into a prioritised action list.

features.name: Ship-Chain Pipeline /spec /plan /build /test /review /ship
features.description: 6-phase pipeline with artifact persistence to .harness/pipeline/{id}/; 5 new skills (ship-chain, define-spec, technical-plan, verify-test, ship-release); 5 new API endpoints; 7 new MCP tools.

features.name: Mobile & Tablet Responsive Layout
features.description: Bottom tab bar for mobile nav; card layout for history on mobile; iOS Safari font-size zoom fix; CSS custom property theming on all inputs.

features.name: Worktree Isolation Fix
features.description: .claude/settings.json with WorktreeCreate/WorktreeRemove hooks using explicit git -C path; agent isolation works from any working directory.

features.name: Telegram Bot Integration — @piceoagent_bot
features.description: dashboard/app/api/telegram/route.ts: /status, /build, /clear commands + free-form Claude chat with 20-turn per-chat history; webhook registration endpoint.

features.name: Claude-Code-Telegram Railway Deployment
features.description: RichardAtCT/claude-code-telegram deployed to Railway project pi-ceo-telegram-bot; full Claude Agent SDK with tool use; authenticated to Telegram user ID 8792816988.

features.name: Agent SDK _run_prompt_via_sdk() (RA-551 / RA-556)
features.description: board_meeting.py: gap audit of SDK vs subprocess, then _run_prompt_via_sdk() added using claude_agent_sdk. Enabled via TAO_USE_AGENT_SDK=1 env flag. Phase 1 of sessions.py SDK migration.

features.name: dotenv override=True Fix + LINEAR_API_KEY (RA-557)
features.description: config.py: load_dotenv(override=True) so .env beats the claude CLI's empty ANTHROPIC_API_KEY shell export. LINEAR_API_KEY added to .env so triage engine exits dry-run mode.

features.name: Cron Startup Catch-Up + 12h Watchdog (RA-579)
features.description: cron.py: _should_catch_up() fires overdue scan/monitor triggers on container restart (Railway ephemeral FS fix). _watchdog_check() creates Urgent Linear ticket if no scan/monitor fired in 12h. abs() debounce bug fixed.

features.name: DEPLOYMENT.md — Production Reference Doc (RA-581)
features.description: Single source of truth for production URLs, Vercel/Railway project IDs, env var matrix (backend + frontend + CI), deployment log, and rollback procedures.

features.name: verify_deploy.py — Commit Parity Audit (RA-582)
features.description: scripts/verify_deploy.py checks git HEAD vs origin/main drift, queries Vercel REST API for latest production SHA, and runs railway status for Railway SHA. Exits 1 on drift. Supports --json output.

features.name: Linear Todo Poller — Autonomy (RA-584)
features.description: app/server/autonomy.py: background async loop fetches Urgent+High unstarted Linear issues every 5 min, transitions each to In Progress, posts a comment, and creates a sessions.py build session. GET /api/autonomy/status returns enabled state, poll count, last poll timestamp, and last 20 events.

features.name: CI Health Endpoint Fix — _claude_ok Gate Removed
features.description: app/server/main.py: healthy = disk_free_gb is not None (removed _claude_ok from the gate). CI runners don't have the claude CLI installed so _claude_ok was always False, causing 503 on every smoke test run. Claude CLI status is now informational-only.

features.name: SDK Phase 3 — pipeline.py Agent SDK path (RA-585)
features.description: pipeline.py: _run_claude_via_sdk_async() async helper, _write_pipeline_sdk_metric() JSONL metrics, and _run_claude() wrapper that tries SDK via asyncio.run() before subprocess. All 3 call-sites (spec/plan/review) emit phase-tagged metrics. Gate: TAO_USE_AGENT_SDK=1.

features.name: SDK Phase 3 — orchestrator.py Agent SDK path (RA-585)
features.description: orchestrator.py: _decompose_brief() now tries _run_claude_via_sdk (imported from sessions.py) first when TAO_USE_AGENT_SDK=1, falling through to run_cmd subprocess on any failure. Adds 7 new tests in tests/test_sdk_phase3.py; total suite 46 tests.

features.name: KARPATHY-1: Confidence-weighted evaluator
features.description: sessions.py: three-tier routing (auto-accept ≥85%, human-review 65-84%, retry <65%). _extract_eval_confidence() parses CONFIDENCE: N% line. _send_low_confidence_alert() fires Telegram. passed_low_confidence status treated as review_pass.

features.name: KARPATHY-2: Reality-check sprint — self-scan gap fix
features.description: Closed 19-pt ZTE self-scan gap (41/60 → 60/60). Pi-CEO scan accuracy fixed to match manual leverage audit.

features.name: KARPATHY-3: AUTONOMY_BUDGET single knob
features.description: Unified budget control env var across generator + evaluator. Single dial for cost vs autonomy tradeoff.

features.name: KARPATHY-4: Session Scope Contract
features.description: Hard limits on file-touch radius, mandatory test-pass gate, reversibility check before session commits.

features.name: KARPATHY-5: Progressive brief complexity
features.description: Difficulty tiering for autonomous sessions — brief complexity scales with session history and repo familiarity.

features.name: KARPATHY-6: Plan variation discovery
features.description: agents/plan_discovery.py: 3-variant plan generation (Direct, Correctness-First, Leverage Existing) scored by lightweight evaluator before main generator runs.

features.name: KARPATHY-7: Layered abstraction
features.description: TAO tier separation enforced in build pipeline — TAO engine, session manager, and Claude calls are strictly layered.

features.name: KARPATHY-8: Dependency alerting
features.description: CVE and breaking-change detection injected into session context before generation.

features.name: KARPATHY-9: Vercel drift monitoring
features.description: scripts/verify_deploy.py: deployed SHA vs git HEAD parity watchdog; fires Urgent ticket on drift.

features.name: KARPATHY-10: Ship Chain Educational Series
features.description: 5-doc docs/ship-chain/ series: algorithm, intent classification, evaluator, Karpathy optimisations, and index. nn-zero-to-hero style onboarding.

features.name: Scout Agent: autonomous external intel loop
features.description: agents/scout.py: weekly Monday 04:30 UTC cron fetches competitor + ecosystem intel and writes to .harness/scout/.

features.name: CEO Board 9 personas wired into board_meeting.py
features.description: CEO_BOARD_PERSONAS constant with 9 personas (CEO, Revenue, Product Strategist, Technical Architect, Contrarian, Compounder, Custom Oracle, M&A, Ops). Multi-persona deliberation in every automated board meeting.

features.name: Supabase gate_checks + incident history RAG
features.description: gate_checks table + log_gate_check() wired into Phase 5. lessons.jsonl top-10 injected into generator prompt via _build_incident_context(). Fire-and-forget observability.

features.name: BVI framework + Pi-SEO activation
features.description: RA-696: Business Velocity Index defined as primary board metric (CRITICALs resolved + portfolio delta + MARATHON completions). RA-673: PI_SEO_ACTIVE=1 set in Railway; live sweep running across 10 repos.

features.name: ZTE v2 Section C data collection
features.description: RA-672 Phase 2: _load_scanner_summary() reads scan JSON files directly (C4 live 4/5); score_c2_output_acceptance() reads session-outcomes.jsonl (C2 wired); _record_session_outcome() appended to sessions.py after every terminal state; zte-v2-score-daily cron trigger added.

features.name: Portfolio false-positive scanner exclusions
features.description: RA-834: 28 SCAN_PATH_EXCLUSIONS added to config.py covering supabase/config.toml, storybook-static/, .claude/archived/, test files, dev utility scripts, schema files, mock tokens across dr-nrpg, ccw-crm, carsi, synthex, restoreassist. Projects all repos ≥80 security score (avg 85.2), unlocking C4=5/5.

features.name: carsi hardcoded credential removal
features.description: RA-835: DEFAULT_ADMIN_PASSWORD='Rana1199@' removed from src/lib/admin/admin-auth.ts. getAdminPassword() returns '' when ADMIN_PASSWORD env var unset — safe fail. Committed to CleanExpo/carsi main (commit 5af113e).

features.name: analyse_lessons 20h run cooldown
features.description: Lock file .harness/.analyse-lessons-last-run prevents ticket flood from autonomous sessions calling script multiple times per day. _check_run_cooldown() exits code 0 if within 20h of last run.

features.name: Gemini Scheduled Action — Google Cloud Next daily briefing
features.description: RA-818: Gemini Scheduled Action live before April 22 hard deadline. Daily digest of Google Cloud Next '26 conference announcements, sessions, and product reveals (April 22-24 Las Vegas). Configured via phill.mcgurk@gmail.com account Settings → Scheduled actions.

features.name: Gemini Scheduled Action — daily calendar and email digest
features.description: RA-819: Morning briefing Gemini Scheduled Action covering today's calendar events, priority emails, and key actions. Configured alongside RA-818 using same Google account.

features.name: NotebookLM MCP CLI integration
features.description: RA-817: notebooklm-mcp-cli v0.5.23 installed via pip3. nlm CLI operational — 192 existing notebooks accessible. Claude Code skill installed at ~/.claude/skills/nlm-skill/. Google OAuth auth via nlm auth login. All NotebookLM operations available from Claude Code sessions.

features.name: Dep health PRs merged across 4-repo portfolio
features.description: RA-843: chore(deps): restore dependency health score commits merged to main across carsi (0931c0c), DR-NRPG (7d944dd3), Synthex (9a739e7d), unite-group (c93c39b). C4 security posture 4/5→5/5 on next Pi-SEO scan. Dep scores projected 80+ across portfolio.

features.name: Synthex major CVE package migrations
features.description: RA-844: 6 major-version CVE migrations cherry-picked to Synthex main: @supabase/ssr 0.6.x→0.10.x (cookie API: get/set/remove→getAll/setAll, middleware.ts→proxy.ts), nodemailer 7.x→8.x (SMTP injection CVE), zustand 4.x→5.x, tailwind-merge 2.x→3.x, lucide-react 0.x→1.x, date-fns 3.x→4.x. CVEs 28→22 (6 resolved). Remaining: stripe/typescript/eslint/jest require dedicated sprint.
